title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. lundbomii
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. lundbomii, also known as a subspecies of the lesser hawk's beard, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Finland. The medicinal properties of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. lundbomii include its ability to act as a diuretic and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful in treating conditions such as kidney stones and arthritis. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which have been shown to possess antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Hieracium nigrescens subsp. lundbomii can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and it may also be used in tincture or capsule form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
